title: Filter
content:
Filter
Function
7–12 energy centers mapping glands, psychology, elemental forces
Use for embodiment + energetic healing
Can be remapped to HD centers, emotions, myths, etc.
6. ⛩️ I Ching (Yi Jing)
Filter
Function
64 Hexagrams (same number as HD gates)
Universal code of change.
Study yourself as a moving oracle—your gates are living hexagrams.
Map your daily energy, archetypes, or creative decisions to trigrams
7. 📜 Mythology / Tarot / Narrative Roles
Filter
Function
Tarot archetypes → 22 Major Arcana + court cards
Greek, Egyptian, Norse deities = roles to integrate
Use to encode personal myth into characters, rituals, or personas
Use the Fool’s Journey, Orpheus myth, or myth cycles as seasonal overlays
8. ⚙️ Systems Thinking / Cybernetics / Fractals
Filter
Function
Use to observe recursive loops, pattern collapse, feedback dynamics
Ideal for high-concept builders like you
Map inner self as open-ended, self-evolving systemKey: What stabilizes? What mutates? What returns changed?
